description: PEARL HARBOR, Hawaii (July 1, 2007) - Rear Adm. Townsend G. Alexander, Commander Navy Region Hawaii and Commander Naval Surface Group Middle Pacific, hosts American country music singer and songwriter Alan Jackson and his family at a visit at the Arizona Memorial before Bay Fest. Bay Fest is an annual event organized by Marine Corps Community Services that is open to the general public. Proceeds from this event directly benefit the quality of life for the Marines, Sailors and their family members stationed in Hawaii. U.S. Navy photo by Mass Communication Specialist Seaman John W. Ciccarelli Jr. (RELEASED)
